Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to look at the sample data provided and see patterns in the events

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the events for CaseID A1 and B2 I notice that each case starts with retrieving a raw metal sheet Then there is scanning a barcode placing it on a table aligning preheating

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: These seem like initial setup or preparation steps Maybe that is a Material Preparation phase

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Next there is picking up a welding tool welding corners and measuring integrity These are part of the actual construction or assembly

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So that could be an Assembly and Welding step

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The coating application drying and visual check are probably the finishing or quality control stages

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So Finishing and Quality Control or something similar

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Material Preparation the events are all about getting the material ready retrieving scanning placing aligning preheating

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Assembly and Welding involves the actual work of welding the corners using tools and checking the welds integrity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Finishing steps include applying a coating drying it and a visual check These are post assembly steps ensuring the product meets standards

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I should also check if there are any other possible groupings

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The events are sequential and each phase follows logically The timestamps show that each phase happens in order without overlap So grouping them by temporal order and resource type makes sense

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to make sure the names are clear and relevant Maybe Material Preparation Welding and Assembly and Finishing and Quality Check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That covers the main stages Each group has events that are logically connected and performed in sequence The rationale is based on the purpose of each step the resources involved and the temporal sequence
